product: Real-time structural defect detection from drone footage on active construction sites
primary_challenge: Scaling from 5 to 50 concurrent drone feeds without inference lag. Multi-site deployment orchestration.
deployment_target: edge - Jetson on drone + cloud aggregation
twelve_month_goal: 200 active construction sites monitored in real time with zero safety incident rate improvement over baseline
investor_narrative: Construction safety incidents cost $170B annually in the US alone — real-time AI detection changes the actuarial math for project insurance
